description_long: This is a cylindrical can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring a vibrant green and teal color scheme with angular, mountain-inspired graphics. The front of the can displays the 'Mtn Dew' logo in bold white, red, and black lettering, set against a background of stylized white peaks and green geometric shapes. The can's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. On one side, a detailed nutritional information panel is visible, printed in white text on the green background. The top of the can has a standard pull tab for opening, typical of carbonated beverage cans. The overall design is eye-catching and modern, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or vending machines.
description: A glossy, green cylindrical can with bold 'Mtn Dew' branding, mountain graphics, and a metallic pull tab top.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the nutritional information panel and part of the mountain graphics visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the can, prominently displaying the 'Mtn Dew' logo and mountain graphics.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show more of the mountain graphics and the side of the logo, with less text visible.
description_view_3: The nutritional information panel is fully visible, along with a partial view of the logo and graphics.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: stylized green and white mountain graphics
